themes.name: [Negative] Unresponsive Customer Support & Multiple Technical Issues

quotes.text: Every day call from different number and said ur broking company send ur profile. Can u buy our trading tips? Why Groww sell our data, name and mobile num to such trading tip company?

Customer service is total waste. For the first time I called customer care, the support executive was not able to resolve the issue or rather I would say was not inclined to listen the query and resolve the issue.

I have been investing in mutual funds for the last year. A few months ago, I took a loan against my mutual fund through Groww. I borrowed 10k and repaid it within a week, but they charged more than 1.1k.
Much time technical problem and many order failed from groww ends and loss taken by customer. OFS failed,IPO order failed and some ipo alloted not showing in demat at the time of listing.
Pay Attention to the prices and your money while trading on this Groww App. Multiple Discrepancies, lags while doing Transactions.

when we are paying this much brokerage to grow then grow should also be responsible for the trader facilities like kills switch option in option trading which protect their capital and stop over trading but only temporary pause which is not useful I am very much regretting to use this app
I have used Groww for almost 4 years and traded F&O for 3 years. My concern is that the live P&L often seems delayed when a trade moves in my favor, while losses appear immediately.

vry vry bad experience.All stocks watching u in Groww app n withdrawal times he not get up. After withdrawal he is sudden up what is this.I watching this many times. do plz do not cheat the people.what is this?????

themes.description: Users are experiencing frequent disconnections, failed orders, and unresponsive customer support, leading to financial losses, frustration, and loss of confidence in the platform.
themes.business_impact: The high number of users reporting similar issues suggests a significant risk of loss of customer trust, negative word-of-mouth, and potential business decline.
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: The root cause of these issues is likely a combination of inadequate infrastructure, inefficient architecture, and insufficient resource allocation.
themes.action_plan:
• Improve server infrastructure, optimize platform architecture, allocate more resources, and invest in proactive monitoring and debugging tools
• Implement multiple support channels (e.g., phone, chat, email) and empower agents with advanced troubleshooting tools
• Introduce automated order resolution mechanisms and escalate critical issues to senior support teams |

themes.name: [Negative] App Manipulates Prices for Profit

quotes.text: frauds deliberately manipulating graphs so user can book at wrong prices
Not good for customers , good for manipulation with hni
this adv kills me. foolish adv, repeats many times and when ever the cell phone is opened.
scammer this is a totally scam app I bought a call of 71700 Sensex for Rs 183 and placed a stop loss of 170 and touched the graph at 172 and my SL was also triggered.
Extra charges, why T+1 share immediately show in demat holding and allowed as normal delivery sell with auto converting to intraday?

themes.description: Users reported that the app manipulates graphs and entry points to favor profits over user needs, leading to financial losses and frustration.
themes.business_impact: Financial loss for users due to unauthorized price manipulation, damage to user trust in the app.
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: Insufficient checks and balances in the app's pricing and order processing systems lead to manipulation.
themes.action_plan:
• Improve price calculation algorithms to ensure transparency and correctness
• Implement robust checks to prevent unauthorized price manipulation
• Educate users about potential risks and consequences.

themes.name: [Negative] High Brokerage Charges

quotes.text: they said brokerage is maximum 20 but it is charging around 50

themes.description: Users are expressing frustration and concern about the high brokerage charges on the app, leading to a negative experience and a potential loss of trust. The charges are perceived as excessive compared to other apps, and users are requesting a reduction or a more transparent fee structure.
themes.business_impact: High customer churn risk due to perceived overcharging and potential loss of revenue as users may switch to competitors.
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: The root cause is likely a misalignment between the app's pricing strategy and user expectations, combined with a lack of transparency and communication around fees.
themes.action_plan:
• Analyze user feedback to understand the reasons behind the high perceived costs
• Identify competitors' pricing strategies and adjust accordingly
• Implement a more transparent fee structure, with clear explanations and comparisons
• Offer incentives for long-term users or loyalty programs
• Regularly review and adjust the pricing strategy to ensure alignment with user expectations and value perception.
